query: SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[0].name') as name1, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[0].teamColor') as color1, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[0].number') as num1, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[1].name') as name2, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[1].teamColor') as color2, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[1].number') as num2, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[2].name') as name3, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[2].teamColor') as color3, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[2].number') as num3, JSON_LENGTH(lineup) as placed_count, version FROM lineup_state WHERE id = 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3PARkGnP7Yq5GFZ.9b78b8692d1f --database SXvJKubXoqm5p7aDCmZ97X --execute SELECT JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[0].name') as name1, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[0].teamColor') as color1, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[0].number') as num1, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[1].name') as name2, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[1].teamColor') as color2, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[1].number') as num2, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[2].name') as name3, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[2].teamColor') as color3, JSON_EXTRACT(players, '$[2].number') as num3, JSON_LENGTH(lineup) as placed_count, version FROM lineup_state WHERE id = 1;
